text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ummm, let's see... training, noodles, and spins!
I'm gonna give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa continues trying in vain to find a
good cheer to pump herself up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she might not notice it herself, she seems
tired. It might be good to adjust her race
schedule.
